caption: The video features an individual standing at a podium, delivering a speech. The person is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white kurta and vest, and has a white beard. They are positioned in front of a textured wall with a decorative pattern, and there is a microphone on the podium to amplify their voice. At one point, the individual claps their hands together, possibly emphasizing a point or acknowledging applause. To the right of the podium, there is a tall, cylindrical structure with a glass top containing red petals, adding a ceremonial touch to the setting. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal event or address.
